'''gadoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamosity|squamosity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamosity|squamosity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gadoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædeketh|gædeketh]] || [[word:gædekej|gædekej]] || [[word:gædekesh|gædekesh]] || [[word:gædeke|gædeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadodokoth|gadodokoth]] || [[word:gadodokoj|gadodokoj]] || [[word:gadodokosh|gadodokosh]] || [[word:gadodoko|gadodoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadokoth|gadokoth]] || [[word:gadokoj|gadokoj]] || [[word:gadokosh|gadokosh]] || [[word:gadoko|gadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadofkofth|gadofkofth]] || [[word:gadofkofj|gadofkofj]] || [[word:gadofkofsh|gadofkofsh]] || [[word:gadofkof|gadofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadokotho|gadokotho]] || [[word:gadokojo|gadokojo]] || [[word:gadokosho|gadokosho]] || [[word:gadokoko|gadokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadokoth|gadokoth]] || [[word:gadokoj|gadokoj]] || [[word:gadokosh|gadokosh]] || [[word:gadoko|gadoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadokothol|gadokothol]] || [[word:gadokojol|gadokojol]] || [[word:gadokoshol|gadokoshol]] || [[word:gadokokol|gadokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadokoothotho|gadokoothotho]] || [[word:gadokoojojo|gadokoojojo]] || [[word:gadokooshosho|gadokooshosho]] || [[word:gadokooko|gadokooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadokothon|gadokothon]] || [[word:gadokojon|gadokojon]] || [[word:gadokoshon|gadokoshon]] || [[word:gadokokon|gadokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadokothooro|gadokothooro]] || [[word:gadokojooro|gadokojooro]] || [[word:gadokoshooro|gadokoshooro]] || [[word:gadokokooro|gadokokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
